Welcome to Wikipedia, a collaborative project to produce a free and complete encyclopedia in every language. We started in January 2001 and are already working on over 196500 articles in the English version. Visit the help page and experiment in the sandbox to learn how you can edit any article right now.

Selected Articles
This day in history: October 30
Ongoing events: Israeli-Palestinian conflict
War on Terrorism - terrorist incidents
In the news: World events - Technology - Science discoveries - Sports
Recent deaths: Notable persons - Historical figures
